textByHash.01ad8a8d826cb4dd8ffcd64d2cc3462eb422f55d: Greetings again outerlander! I must say, I am still impressed with the way you moved through my maze!
textByHash.17de886ce04c9df2c15ce97f06840e7777a9c68f: Outerlander! You have finished my maze! I am genuinely impressed!
textByHash.1b9366cca2eabc8249fedfc1f9b66c9d40e5e275: I have already told you outerlander; I will not exchange it for anything other than a divination on the weather from our seer himself!
textByHash.30daf912ae54404852bfe79e59e79aabe27a04d1: Greetings to you sister ! How fare you today?
textByHash.31d0753b219add97f1e4b23f2b14d313bb382a16: Here, outerlander; you may take my map of local fishing patterns with my gratitude!
textByHash.351b3151ecd0e4350d17f68c0c06ea3f53c1670f: Should something happen to me, all members of our tribe have some basic sense of direction so that they may always return safely home.
textByHash.408c63dd09f150833aeedff97e4850e5ee842be4: I will warn you outerlander, this maze was designed by myself, and is of the most fiendish complexity!
textByHash.4632750a7f0373c65007bc44aba0980f2d7dc582: I just told you: from the Seer. You will need to persuade him to take the time to make a forecast somehow.
textByHash.49c50cf84c782437978b59058e33d33bbed2c8d8: Have you no manners outerlander? This is my home, you will show me the due respect!
textByHash.514554a5e5f08388ad8fba2e2ec6859b4600acc5: If you are able to demonstrate to me that you too have a good sense of direction then I will recommend you to the rest of the council of elders immediately.
textByHash.525714ae8059221b3b08b10b57b2508633bebde2: [laugh][laugh]! Don't worry outerlander, you are not the first to fail its puzzle!
textByHash.5a151b80920d768f641f457b3cd0568394c019f8: Have it? Just like that? I think not outerlander. This map shows all of the prime fishing locations nearby.
textByHash.5b7381940ed5512366af4e5ff44cc6235221f91d: The other reason is of course that I have already memorised it, so I can make myself another copy whenever I want!
textByHash.7313c33499c0bd6ec11557bd47a7eaeff4638e58: What exactly is a 'lab rat' anyway?
textByHash.795f65c7139e0141a55fd2a1404e04472613ab24: Greetings to you brother ! How fare you today?
textByHash.811b350b7bcec2a1055ccd3a68d4e6f84066b089: Hmmm? Well, firstly it will be of value to our entire clan, so I have lost nothing from giving it to you.
textByHash.8d79cdbe75a34110cb1bbfdb2a0b34a725983303: With this forecast I will be able to plan a safe course for our next raiding expedition!
textByHash.9456e6a322d441f51d4cb306ed01045bfb22774c: ...but you must first pass a little test for me to prove you are worthy.
textByHash.9587ad5e5209130f8f76535eab6282db62e31f06: Hello outerlander. This is my home, I would be grateful if you would leave.
textByHash.97bb827d6aea5c6695672f188db87b3ce63cbf7b: Absolutely! You will be an asset to the clan!
textByHash.9861a6b326c77aee3b726bdd037a8ec7e1431585: Decided you could not solve my labyrinth after all, did you outerlander? Too tricky for you?
textByHash.a07446d076186fbac51a22622292177a68fec425: It is very valuable to our clan. I am afraid I can not just give it away.
textByHash.a6c66ff1e783262247f0a7e798523122d708f209: Of course outerlander! I am nothing if not a man of my word!
textByHash.aaa7706627556f86d788aad6ea472e03a85b63c2: You wish to try my challenge?
textByHash.aca9b1e5ed4ad918dee99e911e3a9c9683fcfc88: [laugh][laugh][laugh] it is the most complex route I have ever devised! I am truly a genius at navigation! The world will remember my name!
textByHash.adb10433e480402b58354bfc6e8c23aa98390ab5: No, you cannot. It is my maze, or nothing.
textByHash.b7d81518ae81742fe60653d5c4459423eb2f1d76: Hmmm? Why of course! As the navigator for the Fremennik I keep all of our maps secure right here.
textByHash.c06f672b6c6754a374a5de181ca109ad27ad95f7: W-what...? I don't believe it! How did you...? I suppose it doesn't matter, you have my gratitude outerlander!
textByHash.c12cff189b03f26f4d4f0d3fa27f7c88ec8604e8: As a navigator, the weather is extremely important for plotting the best course. Unfortunately the Seer is always too busy to help me with a forecast.
textByHash.c23a4f792e4f54401b1207d1d34bb49cffdd3338: A trade? For a map of the best fishing spots in a hundred leagues? I will trade it for no less than a weather forecast from our Seer.
textByHash.c9c4a9c0664ed63f3b5e66f322b20e856b8d8eba: You wish to stop being an outerlander? I can understand that! I have no reason why I would prevent you becoming a Fremennik...
textByHash.e16d7a8d83590be8bfffa842a5ea82b0636dc986: Ah, a simple task! Below this building I have constructed a maze; should you be able to walk from one side to the other that will be proof to me.
textByHash.e4ddb39b38c558ebefa0e15dde6d9ba3d3d41f57: Well, I serve our clan as a navigator. The seas can be a fearful place when you know not where you are heading.
textByHash.eddb7cf2b35f4fea7adc8eed7c0fd6ee0968bfef: Well, I am sorry you feel that way outerlander. I cannot vouch for you until you prove to me you have some skill that will benefit our clan somehow.
textByHash.f03bc7a0f47816483e590edc8d6283f5d2b69c39: I am sorry outerlander, I will not offer you hospitality until my Chieftain has vouched for your honesty. This is our way.
